response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops, dev tooling exposure) and some adjacent developer-tools work via MCP code generators and CI/Docker setup at Altom. However, the resume shows no formal people-management or team-lead title, no demonstrated mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale, and no leadership of organizational change — all central to this Engineering Manager role focused on build systems and mobile developer productivity.
strengths: Deep engineering tenure (13+ years) with strong testing/TDD and developer-tooling instincts
Has built developer tools, CI/CD pipelines, test runners (Trial), and assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated knowledge sharing via workshops, courses, and dojos — useful for team development
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016, nothing recent)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning team roadmaps at scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
